title: CCL - During  Call - Settings are locked
scenario: Close Conversation Limiting (CCL) settings are locked and greyed out during an active call, with a dialog preventing adjustment until the call ends
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Verify that Close Conversation Limiting (CCL) options are visible.
5. Place or receive an active call using the connected Poly Bluetooth device.
6. During the active call, return to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Advanced.
8. Tap on any CCL option (e.g., Off, Low, Medium, High).
10. Return to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Advanced.
expected: During an active call, CCL settings should be locked and greyed out. Tapping any CCL option should show a dialog: "This setting cannot be adjusted when on a call". After ending the call, CCL settings should become available again and the user should be able to change them.
